item_2.title: Business Experience

personnel.name: Melissa Magnuson
personnel.title: Chair of the Board
personnel.prior: Chair of Magnuson Company since 2002; co-founded Magnuson Hotels brand

prior_roles.role: Global Head of Distribution and Revenue Operations

item_2.observation: Very lean leadership team — only 2 disclosed officers for a 2-brand franchise system. No CFO, COO, VP of Operations, or VP of Franchise Development disclosed.

item_10.title: Financing
item_10.content: No financing offered by franchisor, agent, or affiliate. No guarantees. No financing to any Branded Hotel owner.

item_11.title: Franchisor Assistance, Advertising, Computer Systems, Training

pre_opening_obligations.obligation: Make revenue manager available (up to ~100 hours)

ongoing_obligations.obligation: Access to Magnuson Cloud PMS (if elected)
List Guest Rooms on Third-Party Distribution Channels
May designate min/max prices if law permits

computer_systems.required: Approved PMS or Magnuson Cloud PMS

item_12.title: Territory
rights_retained_by_franchisor: Be acquired by or acquire competitors
franchisee_rights: No additional franchise rights or ROFR
item_12.affiliate_competition: Magnuson Company Affiliate Hotels compete with Branded Hotels; conflict resolution at franchisor discretion

item_13.title: Trademarks
item_13.license_risk: Licensing Agreement terminable by parent on 90 days (breach) or 6 months (no-cause) notice
item_13.franchisor_protection_obligation: Not required to protect franchisee right to use marks or indemnify for infringement claims (except in MN per state addendum)
item_13.franchisee_obligations: Must immediately notify of infringement; may not communicate with anyone except franchisor counsel; must cooperate and sign documents as requested

item_14.title: Patents, Copyrights, Proprietary Information

copyrights.scope: Brand Standards, Online Presences, Magnuson Cloud PMS and APIs, all Licensed Brand/System materials

item_14.work_for_hire: All ideas/concepts/materials by franchisee become franchisor property
item_14.confidential_info_scope: Brand Standards, agreements, PMS software/data, operating results, guest information, designated materials

item_15.title: Obligation to Participate
item_15.managing_owner_role: Full-time, day-to-day supervision; authorized to deal with franchisor on all matters; decisions final and binding
item_15.personal_guaranty: All Owners and spouses must execute guaranty
item_15.organizational_requirements: Entity must operate only the franchised hotel (unless approved for additional); org docs must reference franchise agreement restrictions; ownership certificates must bear legend

item_16.title: Restrictions on What Franchisee May Sell
item_16.room_closure_limit: 14 days without approval; Extended Closure Fee if violated
item_16.distribution_channel_control: Franchisor has sole exclusive right to all OTA/GDS listings; franchisee must transfer existing accounts; may not self-list
item_16.reservation_honor: Must honor all confirmed reservations; rebooking obligation; 200% fee for failures
item_16.pricing_control: Franchisor may designate min/max prices if law permits
item_16.room_type_changes: Franchisor does not reserve right to change room types (dictated by Incumbent Hotel)
